type 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference

Package index

Object and Function Typing

typed()
Declare a type-checked function
untyped()
Remove argument and return type validation from a typed function
`%:%`
Declare a typed object
const() optional() maybe()
Modify a type
last_type()
Return the expected type of the last mistyped object

Traits

Traits are functions which add an additional constraint to a type, for example the expected size of an object or its expected class.

bare_typed()
Check typeof()
classed()
Check class()
sized()
Check size
complete()
Check for missing values
unduplicated()
Check for duplicate values
bounded()
Check upper and lower bounds
within()
Check that object is a subset
contains()
Check that object is a superset
same_as()
Check that object is identical to a vector
disjoint_to()
Check that object does not contain values
setequal_to()
Check that object is a given set

Element Typing

has()
Add an element or attribute constraint to a type
on() on_attr() on_elm() on_data() on_each() on_elms() on_attrs()
Select an element or attribute to type

Relations

Relations are special traits which define between-element type constraints, for example that all elements of an object are the same size. These may also be used to define between-argument constraints in typed functions.

has_relation()
Add a between-element constraint to a type
same_classed() same_sized() recyclable() exclusive()
Set between-element type constraints

Type Construction

type_union()
Declare a type union
list_type() list_of_type() dataframe_type()
Type constructors for lists and data frames
is_type() is_type_union()
Test if an object is a type

Object Type Validation

obj_is_type() obj_inspect_type() obj_assert_type()
Check an object against a type

Base Types

t_any t_null t_list t_env t_fun t_vec t_num t_lgl t_bool t_int t_dbl t_chr t_string t_dataframe t_factor t_date t_posixct t_dots
Built-in types

Inlined Helpers

These functions are inlined into typed functions and are not meant for interactive use.

inline_assert_same_classed() inline_assert_same_sized() inline_assert_recyclable() inline_assert_exclusive() inline_abort_mistyped() inline_obj_type_validate() inline_assert_type() inline_arg_assert_type() inline_dots_assert_type() inline_dotlist_assert_type()
Inlined helper functions

On this page
